name: World Series Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow 12-inch bowl or plate, combine all ingredients.
2. Mix well to ensure even distribution of flavors and textures.
3. Place the container of dip on a large platter.
4. Surround with tortilla chips for serving.
5. Add picante sauce, salsa, or taco sauce for garnish or extra zest if desired.
